'''rokazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tweeded|tweeded]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tweeded|tweeded]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rokazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokazhithi|rokazhithi]] || [[word:rokazhiji|rokazhiji]] || [[word:rokazhishi|rokazhishi]] || [[word:rokazhiki|rokazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokazhuthuthu|rokazhuthuthu]] || [[word:rokazhujuju|rokazhujuju]] || [[word:rokazhushushu|rokazhushushu]] || [[word:rokazhukuku|rokazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokazhuthu|rokazhuthu]] || [[word:rokazhuju|rokazhuju]] || [[word:rokazhushu|rokazhushu]] || [[word:rokazhuku|rokazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokazhufthuf|rokazhufthuf]] || [[word:rokazhufjuf|rokazhufjuf]] || [[word:rokazhufshuf|rokazhufshuf]] || [[word:rokazhufkuf|rokazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokazhethe|rokazhethe]] || [[word:rokazheje|rokazheje]] || [[word:rokazheshe|rokazheshe]] || [[word:rokazheke|rokazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokazhothotho|rokazhothotho]] || [[word:rokazhojojo|rokazhojojo]] || [[word:rokazhoshosho|rokazhoshosho]] || [[word:rokazhokoko|rokazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokazhotho|rokazhotho]] || [[word:rokazhojo|rokazhojo]] || [[word:rokazhosho|rokazhosho]] || [[word:rokazhoko|rokazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokazhofthof|rokazhofthof]] || [[word:rokazhofjof|rokazhofjof]] || [[word:rokazhofshof|rokazhofshof]] || [[word:rokazhofkof|rokazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfthĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfjĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfshĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfkĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfthĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfjĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfshĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfkĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfthĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfjĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfshĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rokazhĂŻfkĂŻf|rokazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokazhĂŠthĂŠ|rokazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rokazhĂŠjĂŠ|rokazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rokazhĂŠshĂŠ|rokazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rokazhĂŠkĂŠ|rokazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokazhathatha|rokazhathatha]] || [[word:rokazhajaja|rokazhajaja]] || [[word:rokazhashasha|rokazhashasha]] || [[word:rokazhakaka|rokazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokazhatha|rokazhatha]] || [[word:rokazhaja|rokazhaja]] || [[word:rokazhasha|rokazhasha]] || [[word:rokazhaka|rokazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokazhafthaf|rokazhafthaf]] || [[word:rokazhafjaf|rokazhafjaf]] || [[word:rokazhafshaf|rokazhafshaf]] || [[word:rokazhafkaf|rokazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rokazhasha|rokazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rokazhshĂ«sha|rokazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rokazhrosha|rokazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rokazhmusha|rokazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rokazhyasha|rokazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorokazhnkshĂ«sha|gorokazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorokazhnkrosha|gorokazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorokazhnkmusha|gorokazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorokazhnkyasha|gorokazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rokakazhasha|rokakazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rokakazhshĂ«sha|rokakazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rokakazhrosha|rokakazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rokakazhmusha|rokakazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rokakazhyasha|rokakazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorokakazhnkshĂ«sha|gorokakazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorokakazhnkrosha|gorokakazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorokakazhnkmusha|gorokakazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorokakazhnkyasha|gorokakazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rekĂŠzhasha|rekĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rekĂŠzhshĂ«sha|rekĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rekĂŠzhrosha|rekĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rekĂŠzhmusha|rekĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rekĂŠzhyasha|rekĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorekĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gorekĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorekĂŠzhnkrosha|gorekĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorekĂŠzhnkmusha|gorekĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorekĂŠzhnkyasha|gorekĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rokfazhasha|rokfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rokfazhshĂ«sha|rokfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rokfazhrosha|rokfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rokfazhmusha|rokfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rokfazhyasha|rokfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorokfazhnkshĂ«sha|gorokfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorokfazhnkrosha|gorokfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorokfazhnkmusha|gorokfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorokfazhnkyasha|gorokfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
